title: Setaria brachiariiformis
taxonomy: Setaria brachiariiformis is a species of grass in the family Poaceae. It belongs to the subfamily Panicoideae and is a part of the genus Setaria. The genus Setaria is further classified under the tribe Paniceae and order Poales. The classification of Setaria brachiariiformis reflects its evolutionary relationships with other plants in the Poaceae family. This classification is based on various characteristics, including its morphology, anatomy, and genetic features.
